title: spiraea rubra
intro: Spiraea rubra, also known as red spirea or rose spirea, is a flowering shrub native to East Asia and North America, characterized by its vibrant red or pink flowers and small, white or pinkish berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Spiraea rubra include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Spiraea rubra include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make medicinal extracts and salves for topical application.
